features.title: Zone-Based Galaxy Layout
features.summary: Galaxy split into PvE/PvP zones with dedicated Adventure Zones (5-10 sectors each). Server-side ZonePolicyService enforces security_class and reward multipliers per zone. PvP zones have increased resources and rare drops. Home sectors are on-demand, not part of shared count. 1,980 shared sectors total. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Player Home Sectors (Homesteads)
features.summary: Each player gets a procedurally generated home sector at galaxy rim with resource planets, NPC port, jump points to hubs, and buildable shipyards. Owner + alliance only. One-time Deluxe/Premium Starter Packs (not subscription-tied) for extra sectors. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Universe Scaling Config
features.summary: Start with 1,980 shared sectors, scalable to 3,500 without re-gen. Home sectors are on-demand. Requires PostgreSQL, Redis, background workers, and tick-budget telemetry before 1k CCU. Budget ~$60-100/mo to start.

features.title: Zone Difficulty Scaling
features.summary: NPC levels and hazard intensity scale with distance from Core. Purchasable private Adventure Sectors (PvE, difficulty 1-10). AI-powered NPCs with bounded memory (5 recent + summary), LLM fallback to templates.

features.title: Portals + Static Wormholes
features.summary: Two systems: (1) Player Portals -- purchasable, owned-sector-only, with destination picker modal. (2) Static Wormholes -- public infrastructure in un-ownable sectors, one hop from hyperlanes. 15-20 pairs. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Unstable Wormholes (Adventure Access)
features.summary: Temporary wormholes to adventure clusters lasting DAYS. Auto-teleport home on close (non-bound cargo dropped as salvage at origin to prevent smuggling). 5-10 active at once. Admins can launch event wormholes on the fly.

features.title: Jump Drive Component
features.summary: High-tier ship component: 3-5 sector jumps at once, max 60-second cooldown, Tier 4-5. Endgame long-range mobility.

features.title: Player-Built Gates + Commercial Portals
features.summary: Three tiers: Personal gates (home-to-owned, instant+cooldown), Corporation gates (tolls, PvP-destructible), Commercial PvE-to-PvP portals with 10 Space Hub types (Casino, Arena, Paint Dock, Racing Circuit, Intelligence Broker, etc.).

features.title: Protected Space Lanes
features.summary: Flagged hyperlane connections with PvP disabled and no hostile NPC spawns. Safe but longer routes connecting home to Core and Core hubs.

features.title: Route Planner (Weighted Pathfinder)
features.summary: Currently implemented (BFS, client-side). Click a distant sector to see the shortest path with animated cyan overlay and hop count. Uses BFS on adjacency map.

features.title: PvP Zone Enforcement
features.summary: Frontier (400) and Deep Space (100) are open PvP. Core/Home always safe. PvP zones get better trade margins, more resources, and exclusive Gaia super-colony planets. Defensive stations and planetary satellites. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: PvP Zone Reward Multipliers
features.summary: Zone-specific reward multipliers (Frontier 2.0x, Deep Space 2.5x) driven by ZoneConfig. Exclusive rare crafting materials and ship components only available in PvP space.

features.title: Anti-Griefing Design
features.summary: 6-8 wide entry corridors into PvP, 30-second invuln buffer on entry. Tourist Pass (20 min immunity, in-game currency or store). Tourists cannot enter owned sectors. Anti-scouting restrictions.

features.title: Neutral Safe Harbors in PvP Space
features.summary: Neutral stations deep in PvP space. Dock safely, repair and refuel. No trading. Forward operating bases for PvP campaigns.

features.title: Offline Ship Protection
features.summary: PvE: 3-day protection then auto-dock. PvP: 2-hour vulnerability then auto-recall home (non-bound cargo dropped as salvage at origin). PvP Base Tokens (7-day, grindable/purchasable). Corp HQ Tokens. Vacation Pass for individuals.

features.title: NPC Foundation Fixes (F0-F5)
features.summary: Fix 6 foundation blockers before expanding NPC scope: per-player conversation sessions replacing global dialogue lock (F0), persistent combat targets on NPC state (F1), complete live event pipeline for hails/state-changes (F2), dialogue action payload execution with real side effects (F3), dialogue context normalization and cache-key quality (F4), and NPC UX end-to-end test coverage (F5).

features.title: Living Sector Presence
features.summary: Make every active sector feel inhabited: live NPC roster updates via WebSocket, proactive hails and warnings from traders/patrols/pirates/bounty hunters, ambient NPC beats every 3-5 minutes in populated sectors, compact event feed with timestamps and source NPC.

features.title: Actionable Service NPCs & Contracts
features.summary: Turn service NPC dialogue into real gameplay loops: trader Buy/Sell opens trade UI, patrol Report Crime/Ask Bounties/Request Escort create game records, bounty hunter contracts create missions, pirate bribes process real payments. 100% of menu actions produce gameplay consequence.

features.title: NPC Memory & Relationship Summaries
features.summary: Named NPCs remember the player: NpcMemory model keyed by npc_id + player_id with bounded relationship summaries (sentiment, trust/fear/respect scores, notable facts, recent memory bullets). Greeting adaptation, pricing adjustments, and relationship indicators in chat header.

features.title: Faction & Clan Territory Presence
features.summary: Zone-aware NPC spawning and regional identity: core/inner/outer/frontier/special spawn profiles, faction-tagged patrol/trader traffic, clan-tagged pirate presence, lightweight rotating territory events (convoys, sweeps, tolls, harassment alerts), map overlays and rumor feeds tied to territory.

features.title: NPC Clan Territory & Raider Economy
features.summary: Level-scaled NPC raids. No-raid safe zones in Core PvE. Players can bribe, hire, or destroy raiders. Hire raiders to attack enemies or defend sectors. Raider bases are destructible and respawn elsewhere.

features.title: Zone-Scaled Raid Frequency
features.summary: Predictable raid frequency per zone. Inner Ring: rare. Outer Ring: moderate. Frontier: frequent. Players can prepare based on where they settle.

features.title: Stronghold Clearing + Planet Boss Fights + POIs
features.summary: Space-based clan clearing (3 sectors, escalating waves). Planet boss fights with permanent raid immunity. Regenerating POIs spread throughout. Adventure areas restricted to Party/Corp+Allies. Party system required.

features.title: Adventure Sector System
features.summary: 60 sectors reserved for group content. Gated entry (3-5 players, min ship tier, or sector key). Instanced or limited occupancy. Periodic resets.

features.title: Derelict Capital Ship Exploration
features.summary: Room-by-room clearing of abandoned ships on a grid (16x16 to 32x32). NPC encounters, environmental hazards, loot. Reuses colony surface grid engine with ship tileset.

features.title: Alien Hive Sectors
features.summary: Survival-style waves of escalating NPC enemies. Higher waves = better loot. Team roles (healer/tank/DPS) matter.

features.title: Nebula Navigation Challenges
features.summary: Environmental hazard sectors with damaging nebulae. Specific ship components (Nebula Shield, Radiation Plating) reduce damage. Gear-check mechanic. Hard to craft or store-purchasable.

features.title: Raid Bosses
features.summary: Single powerful NPC requiring coordinated fleet tactics. Multiple phases, special mechanics. Weekly reset. Top-tier loot.

features.title: Timed Resource Rushes
features.summary: Sector floods with rare materials for 15 minutes. Mixed PvPvE. Announced server-wide. Hub portals provide fast access from anywhere.

features.title: Store Design Philosophy
features.summary: Everything purchasable MUST be grindable. Formal entitlement taxonomy (permanent, consumable, cosmetic, convenience) with hard boundaries. One-time Starter Packs for sectors (not subscription-tied). Premium subscription for convenience only. Free players on the SAME map.

features.title: Cosmetic Store Items
features.summary: Ship skins, engine trails, decals, nameplates, faction packs, station decorations, crew outfits. All visual-only. Earnable via achievements or grind.

features.title: Homestead Expansion
features.summary: Buy up to 3 additional sectors (total 4). Add planets to sectors (cap 4-6). Templates: Mining Colony, Agricultural Haven, Fortress, Trade Hub. Premium gets 3 sectors included.

features.title: Convenience Items
features.summary: XP boosters, inventory expansion, fast travel tokens, auto-repair kits. External Storage Module (+50 cargo, no slot used, ship-size cap). All grindable.

features.title: Premium Currency (Star Gems)
features.summary: Dual currency: Credits (in-game) + Star Gems (premium). Gems buy cosmetic ships, not stat-superior. 3-day flash + 30-day extended sales. Admin-editable specials. Grind rate: weeks not months.

features.title: Dynamic Supply/Demand Pricing
features.summary: 30+ commodities, 8 port types, 10-min economy ticks, 7-day price history. New: livestock, exotic plants, food crops for Minecraft-style farming/ranching economy. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: 8+ Port Types (+ PvP Player Ports)
features.summary: Base 8 port types plus PvP sector owners can build destination ports: Casino, Exotic Market, Arena, Bounty Board, Repair Bay. Tied to Commercial Portal system. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Trading Interface + Profit Indicators
features.summary: Buy/sell at ports with average cost basis display and Best Trades panel. Traders always see what they paid so they never sell at a loss unknowingly.

features.title: Dynamic Economy Scaling
features.summary: Port restock rates scale with regional player count. High-traffic zones restock fast. Remote zones are sparse and expensive, rewarding explorers.

features.title: Turn-Based Space Combat
features.summary: Shields, armor, crits (10%, 2x dmg), flee mechanics. Max 50 rounds. 2% component degradation per round. 70% loot chance. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Real-Time Combat System
features.summary: Alternative real-time combat with speed control (1x/2x/4x/Skip). Detailed loot breakdown. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Ground Combat
features.summary: 5 unit types + new Artillery and Air Support. Grid-based with terrain effects, cover, orbital bombardment. Air support requires Landing Pad building.

features.title: 6 NPC Types
features.summary: Pirate, Pirate Lord, Trader, System Patrol, Bounty Hunter + Colony Workers. Workers are hireable NPCs that boost colony production. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: 15 Ship Types (incl. Construction Ship)
features.summary: 14 existing + Construction Ship (consumable, destroyed on project completion). Faction-specific hull configurations: Terran=cargo/trade, Zythian=weapon/armor, Automaton=tech/scanner, Synthesis=scanner/stealth, Sylvari=cargo/colony slots. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: 8+ Component Types, 50+ Components
features.summary: 6 existing + Research Modules + Artifact Components (Phase Cloak, Gravity Anchor, Chrono Stabilizer, Void Lens). Plus Tractor Beams, Mining Lasers, Comm Arrays, Nebula Shields. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Ship Designer (Marketing Funnel)
features.summary: MAJOR CONVERSION TOOL. Ship designer available to website VISITORS (no account needed). Over-the-top engaging experience that hooks visitors into finishing their build. Discount flagship on signup. Must be robust, hold attention, and guide completion. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Ship Cosmetic Customizer
features.summary: 25 hull colors, 15 accent colors, 8 trails, 10 decals, 8 skins, 6 nameplates. Live preview. PvP Paint Docks offer exclusive options. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Fleet System
features.summary: Max 5 fleets, 10 ships each. Shift+drag selection. Instant fleet jump (switch control to any fleet). Attack warning system with instant attention teleport. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Planet Colonization
features.summary: 14 planet types (existing 10 + Forest, Swamp, Ruins, Radiated Ruins). Colony Ship required. Minecraft-style surfaces MUST visually match planet type (ice planet = ice biome, volcanic = lava biome, etc.). Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Colony Buildings (Blueprint + Freeform)
features.summary: Two modes: (1) Blueprint System -- acquire, fill with resources, construct. (2) Freeform -- Minecraft-style custom building. Unified blueprint pipeline for buildings, ships, and components. Empire-wide logistics dashboard for multi-colony management. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Colony Surface Grid (Minecraft-Style)
features.summary: FLAGSHIP FEATURE. Two systems: 2D PixiJS (functional) + 3D Voxel Engine (Three.js, rendering fixed — greedy mesher winding order + texture atlas flipY corrected). First-person WASD controls with pointer lock. Phased delivery: deterministic terrain first, then camera modes, then blueprint system. Start 64x64, expansion tokens to 128x128 cap. Chunk-based loading.

features.title: Wonder System (Realm + Planet Limits)
features.summary: Buildable + pre-existing wonders. Realm-limited (1 Genesis Device empire-wide) vs planet-limited. Pre-existing wonders found via exploration. Colonization exclusivity in PvE. Insta Colony Ships: home sector only.

features.title: No Hard Colony Limits
features.summary: No artificial cap. Soft pressure via maintenance scaling (colony 5 = ~2.8x cost, colony 10 = ~7.9x), crew requirements, defense burden. Wealthy endgame players can run 15+.

features.title: Crew System (Deep RPG Layer)
features.summary: 13 species, individual skill trees, clothing/equipment/personal artifacts, crafting for crew gear. Ships require crew to operate. Players get attached to their crew -- training, equipping, and specializing them. Security details and troop ships need larger crews. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Crew Economy (Balanced Burden)
features.summary: Species-based salary, 24h tick. CRITICAL: must not overburden players. Salary + food + training + upkeep must feel manageable, not like a job. Auto-scaling costs that stay proportional to income. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Player Levels (1-20)
features.summary: XP table from 100 to 1M. 8 skills (Combat, Shield, Trade, Nav, Engineering, Leadership, Mining, Scanner). Skill points per level, max skill 10. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Tech Research Tree (Expanded)
features.summary: Expanded from 7 to 15+ techs covering all new systems: portals, construction ships, crew skills, planetary mining, AI companions, PvP structures, commercial hubs. Branching tree with faction-specific unlocks.

features.title: Crafting System (5 Blueprint Categories)
features.summary: Expanded to 5 categories: Ship Components, Buildings, Ships, Crew Gear (weapons/armor/tools/accessories), and Artifacts (personal + ship). Unified pipeline for all. Special artifact blueprints from rare drops.

features.title: Mission System
features.summary: Expanded mission system covering all skills and levels. Surface missions, space missions, crew missions, trade missions, combat missions, exploration, crafting. Template/instance model with dynamic generation. Must scale from level 1 tutorials to endgame multi-stage epics.

features.title: Client Achievement System
features.summary: Server-authoritative achievement system (migrating from 12 localStorage prototypes). Criteria evaluation and reward grants on server. Trophy panel on Dashboard.

features.title: Endgame & Lifer Retention
features.summary: Critical: keep endgamers who "have everything." Server transfers with legacy rewards, cross-wipe bank vaults, prestige resets, over-the-top endgame adventures, competitive seasons, and community leadership roles.

features.title: Corporation System + Alliances
features.summary: 50K creation cost, max 20 members. Alliance system (cap 3-5 allies). Player-adjustable sector access: Corp Only, Corp+Allies, Public, or Locked. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Player Messaging
features.summary: In-game mail with reply button and unread count in sidebar.

features.title: 5 Factions (Expandable)
features.summary: 5 playable factions: Terran Alliance (trade), Zythian Swarm (combat), Automaton Collective (tech), Synthesis Accord (intelligence/espionage), Sylvari Dominion (exploration/colony). Architecture supports easy addition of new factions — config + art + CSS tokens only, zero code changes.

features.title: Community Events
features.summary: Server-wide events with contribution system for collective goals.

features.title: Corporation Territory Claims
features.summary: CORPORATIONS (not alliances) claim 5-10 public sectors via control structures. Allied corps get shared bonuses in claimed territory. Bonuses: reduced taxes, faster repairs. PvP: contestable.

features.title: 10+ Outpost Types
features.summary: Expanded from 4 to 10+. Original: Trade Relay, Scanner Post, Defense Platform, Fuel Cache. New: Comm Relay, Mining Drone Hub, Repair Station, Nav Beacon, Smuggler Cache, Toll Gate, Research Probe. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Task Automation
features.summary: Current: max 3 automated tasks, 1-min interval, 1.5x fuel. Unified action-authority pipeline with budgets, cooldowns, and audit. Foundation for AI agent system. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: AI Agent Companion
features.summary: Player-linked AI companion runs as a scoped sub-account (AgentAccount model) with API key auth, ABAC permissions, daily credit budgets, rate limiting, and full action audit logging. Agent game routes proxy existing controllers with permission/budget/rate gates. OpenClaw-compatible SKILL.md and tools.json included. Frontend AgentPage with overview, permissions, settings, and activity log tabs.

features.title: 10 Artifact Types
features.summary: Equippable artifacts with functional bonuses: fuel, energy, scan, shields, crew, speed, research, damage, flee chance, efficiency. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.summary: 8 navigation shortcuts (D/S/M/V/T/C/P/I), Esc closes dialogs, ? shows help overlay.

features.title: Mobile Responsive Layout (PWA Priority)
features.summary: 60% of players expected on mobile. PWA first, native app later. Needs: touch controls, swipe gestures, offline capability, push notifications, pinch zoom on map.

features.title: Basic Accessibility
features.summary: ARIA labels on nav/main/modals. aria-current on active nav items.

features.title: Faction-Colored UI Theming
features.summary: Sidebar accent, XP bar, and nav states adapt to faction color. 5 themes: Terran=blue, Zythian=red, Automaton=purple, Synthesis=gold, Sylvari=green. Each with unique border-radius personality.

features.title: Galaxy Map Canvas
features.summary: Quadtree-optimized. Start 1,200 sectors, expandable to 3,500. Delaunay triangulation, hyperlanes, fleet selection, route overlay. Print-to-PDF for offline reference. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: In-Game Wiki (Web-Accessible)
features.summary: 19 articles. Must be available via web. No article limit. Extensive coverage of every game element with screenshots. SEO-friendly for organic traffic.

features.title: Toast Notification System
features.summary: Global NotificationContext with success/info/warning/error types. Auto-dismiss.

features.title: WebSocket Connection
features.summary: Real-time connection indicator (green/red dot). Socket service for live updates. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Distributed Player Spawning
features.summary: New players start in home sector, first jump to 1 of 30-50 Core hubs distributed by faction. Prevents Day 1 congestion.

features.title: Sector Instance Limits
features.summary: Cap 15-25 players per shared sector (revised down from 30-50). Each player in a sector costs ~2-5MB RAM + WebSocket + tick processing. Queue if cap hit. Home sectors: 1 instance per owner.

features.title: Action Audit & Abuse Detection
features.summary: Append-only server-side audit/event ledger for player, agent, automation, PvP, economy, and moderation actions. Time-partitioned with 90-day hot retention. Required for anti-cheat, refunds, disputes, and GM tooling.

features.title: Asynchronous Job Queue & Scheduler
features.summary: Vendor-portable queue interface for agents, governors, construction, wormhole timers, raids, notifications, and economy recomputes. Keeps long-running work out of request handlers and hot tick loops.

features.title: Live Ops Observability & Feature Flags
features.summary: Operational control plane for metrics, tracing, kill switches, staged rollouts, and feature flags across PvP, economy, agents, raids, and voxel systems.

features.title: Economic Credit Sinks
features.summary: Wormhole fees, gate construction, PvP insurance, adventure entry costs, wonder construction, homestead expansion. Prevent inflation.

features.title: Discovery & Fog of War
features.summary: PlayerDiscovery model tracks visited sectors. Fog reveals adjacent on visit. Scanner upgrades reveal 2-3 hops. Star chart purchases from NPCs. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Unified Anti-Cheat & Anti-Exploit Architecture
features.summary: Centralized anti-cheat infrastructure consolidating device fingerprinting, alt-account detection, rate limiting, bot detection, trade-route abuse prevention, account-bound enforcement, combat idempotency, and reward journaling into one authoritative service layer.

features.title: GM/Moderation Tooling
features.summary: Comprehensive GM and moderation dashboard providing player reporting, appeal/dispute workflows, penalty escalation, chat moderation, live spectate, bulk ban tools, and full audit trail integration.

features.title: Server-Authoritative Achievement System
features.summary: Server-side achievement state management replacing localStorage, with tamper-resistant unlock validation, event-driven progress tracking from action-audit, cross-device sync, and anti-fraud enforcement where the client is display-only.

features.title: Player Reporting & Appeal System
features.summary: Player-facing reporting and appeals interface: in-game report buttons on profiles and death screens, categorized reports with evidence attachment, appeal submission from account settings, resolution notifications, and GM priority queue integration.
